bands.name: elite
bands.description: Top performers. Continuous delivery with high automation and confidence.

bands.name: high
bands.deployment_frequency: Between once per day and once per week
bands.description: Strong performers with mature delivery practices.

bands.name: medium
bands.deployment_frequency: Between once per week and once per month
bands.description: Developing teams with room to improve automation and deployment practices.

bands.name: low
bands.description: Early-stage delivery maturity. Significant investment needed.
